name: EOQ Inventory Calculator
description: Industrial-grade Economic Order Quantity calculator with integrated cost analysis, safety stock, and reorder point optimization. Compliant with ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Annual Demand (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. Used to calculate order frequency and total cycle stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. Used to calculate order frequency and total cycle stock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürünün bir yıl boyunca toplam tahmini talebi. Sipariş sıklığı ve toplam çevrim stoğunu hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtprognose des Bedarfs für das Produkt über ein Jahr. Wird zur Berechnung der Bestellhäufigkeit und des gesamten Umlaufbestands verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande totale prévue pour l'article sur un an. Utilisée pour calculer la fréquence des commandes et le stock de cycle total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Demanda total pronosticada para el artículo durante un año. Se utiliza para calcular la frecuencia de pedido y el stock de ciclo total.

inputs.label: Ordering Cost per Order
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost incurred per purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, transportation setup).

label_i18n.fr: Coût de passation de commande par commande

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed cost incurred per purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, transportation setup).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma siparişi başına sabit maliyet (ör. idari, muayene, nakliye kurulumu).
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixe Kosten pro Bestellung (z. B. Verwaltung, Prüfung, Transporteinrichtung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût fixe engagé par commande d'achat (ex. : administratif, inspection, configuration du transport).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo fijo incurrido por cada pedido de compra (por ejemplo, administrativo, inspección, configuración de transporte).

inputs.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year
inputs.businessContext: Cost to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital cost.

label_i18n.en: Holding Cost per Unit per Year
label_i18n.tr: Birim Başına Yıllık Elde Tutma Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût de possession par unité par an
label_i18n.es: Costo de mantenimiento por unidad por año

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir birimi bir yıl boyunca stokta tutmanın maliyeti; depolama, sigorta, eskime ve sermaye maliyetini içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die Lagerung einer Einheit für ein Jahr, einschließlich Lagerung, Versicherung, Veralterung und Kapitalkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de détention d'une unité en stock pendant un an, incluant stockage, assurance, obsolescence et coût du capital.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de mantener una unidad en inventario durante un año, incluyendo almacenamiento, seguro, obsolescencia y costo de capital.

inputs.label: Unit Cost (Purchase Price)
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price per unit from supplier. Used to calculate total annual purchase cost and capital tied up.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price per unit from supplier. Used to calculate total annual purchase cost and capital tied up.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiden birim başına satın alma fiyatı. Yıllık toplam satın alma maliyeti ve bağlı sermayeyi hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einkaufspreis pro Einheit vom Lieferanten. Wird zur Berechnung der gesamten jährlichen Einkaufskosten und des gebundenen Kapitals verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix d'achat unitaire auprès du fournisseur. Utilisé pour calculer le coût total annuel d'achat et le capital immobilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de compra por unidad del proveedor. Se utiliza para calcular el coste total anual de compra y el capital inmovilizado.

inputs.label: Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Average time from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sipariş verme ile teslim alma arasındaki ortalama süre. Emniyet stoğu ve yeniden sipariş noktası hesaplamaları için kritiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit von der Bestellung bis zum Eingang. Entscheidend für die Berechnung von Sicherheitsbestand und Meldebestand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai moyen de la commande à la réception. Critique pour le calcul du stock de sécurité et du point de commande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio desde la realización del pedido hasta la recepción. Crítico para el cálculo del stock de seguridad y el punto de pedido.

inputs.label: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of daily demand. Used to calculate safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).

label_i18n.en: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
label_i18n.fr: Variabilité de la demande (écart type de la demande quotidienne)
label_i18n.es: Variabilidad de la demanda (desviación estándar de la demanda diaria)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of daily demand. Used to calculate safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük talebin standart sapması. Belirsizlik altında emniyet stoğu hesaplamak için kullanılır (Altı Sigma yaklaşımı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung des täglichen Bedarfs. Wird zur Berechnung des Sicherheitsbestands unter Unsicherheit (Six Sigma-Ansatz) verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la demande quotidienne. Utilisé pour calculer le stock de sécurité en situation d'incertitude (approche Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de la demanda diaria. Se utiliza para calcular el stock de seguridad bajo incertidumbre (enfoque Seis Sigma).

inputs.label: Desired Service Level
inputs.businessContext: Target probability of not stocking out during lead time. Higher service levels increase safety stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target probability of not stocking out during lead time. Higher service levels increase safety stock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslim süresi boyunca stokta kalmama olasılığı hedefi. Daha yüksek hizmet seviyeleri emniyet stoğunu artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielwahrscheinlichkeit, während der Lieferzeit keinen Fehlbestand zu haben. Höhere Servicegrade erhöhen den Sicherheitsbestand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité cible de ne pas être en rupture de stock pendant le délai de livraison. Des niveaux de service plus élevés augmentent le stock de sécurité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad objetivo de no quedarse sin stock durante el plazo de entrega. Niveles de servicio más altos aumentan el stock de seguridad.

inputs.label: Backorder Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost incurred per unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).

label_i18n.es: Coste de rotura de stock por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost incurred per unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Talep stoktan karşılanamadığında birim başına oluşan maliyet (kayıp satış, ceza, hızlandırma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Einheit, wenn die Nachfrage nicht aus dem Lagerbestand gedeckt werden kann (entgangene Verkäufe, Strafen, Eilbeschaffung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût encouru par unité lorsque la demande ne peut être satisfaite à partir du stock (ventes perdues, pénalité, expédition accélérée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste incurrido por unidad cuando no se puede satisfacer la demanda desde el stock (ventas perdidas, penalización, envío urgente).

rules.message: Annual demand must be greater than zero.
Ordering cost, holding cost, and unit cost must be positive.
Service level must be one of the predefined values.
EOQ exceeds warehouse capacity. Consider reducing order quantity or increasing capacity.

thresholds.message: Total inventory cost exceeds 20% of total purchase cost. Review holding or ordering costs.
Safety stock is more than 50% of EOQ. High demand variability or service level may be driving inefficiency.
Inventory turns are below 4. Consider reducing order quantity or increasing demand.
Space cost is more than 30% of total holding cost. Evaluate warehouse layout or item footprint.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
